india_trends.title: India's Reliance to shut some units at 660,000 bpd refinery, govt official says
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries plans refinery maintenance. Some units at its 660,000 barrels per day refinery will close for three to four weeks. This shutdown follows Nayara Energy's operational resumption later this month. A senior petroleum ministry official confirmed the maintenance schedule. Reliance will

india_trends.title: KPIT Technologies Q4 Results: Cons profit falls 33% YoY to Rs 163 crore despite 12% revenue uptick
india_trends.summary: KPIT Technologies reported a 33% YoY drop in Q4 profit despite 12% revenue growth. However, earnings improved sequentially, and the company announced a final dividend of Rs 5.25 per share for FY26.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 6: Coforge, Vodafone Idea, HFCL, BPCL, Tata Motors, IndiGo among top gainers
india_trends.summary: On May 6, Indian markets closed higher with the Nifty 50 up 1.24% and the Sensex gaining 1.22%, driven by easing US-Iran tensions. Notable gains were seen in technology and auto stocks, although several shares faced declines amid profit booking.

india_trends.title: MCX tech glitch: Zerodha flags order issues across brokers, advises caution for commodity trading
india_trends.summary: Zerodha told clients that some orders on MCX may get rejected or experience delays in status updates due to the glitch. It advised traders in the commodities segment to exercise caution until the issue is resolved.

india_trends.title: HDFC Bank shares jump over 3% as report finds no governance concerns post chairman exit
india_trends.summary: HDFC Bank shares surged over 3% following a Reuters report indicating independent legal reviews found no major governance lapses. india_trends.title: Crude oil prices hit a lower circuit on US-Iran peace hopes; Brent oil below $104 per barrel
india_trends.summary: Crude oil prices fell over 6% to $102.79 per barrel after Trump announced progress in US-Iran negotiations. The halt in marine traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has contributed to rising prices, while US crude stockpiles have decreased for three consecutive weeks.

india_trends.title: India's electric vehicle sales jump 75% in April, Tata Motors leads EV momentum
india_trends.summary: Electric passenger vehicle sales surged by 75.14 percent in April 2026. Tata Motors led the passenger vehicle segment with a 77.17 percent increase. india_trends.title: Sebi classifies 'significant indices' based on Rs 20,000-cr AUM threshold
india_trends.summary: Sebi has introduced a new framework classifying indices as 'significant' if mutual funds track them with over Rs 20,000 crore in daily average AUM for six consecutive months. This move aims to boost transparency and accountability in index governance. Index providers offering these significant indic

india_trends.title: Bulls back on D-St! Sensex rallies over 940 pts, Nifty closes above 24,330. Here's why
india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets surged over 1% on Wednesday, with the Sensex and Nifty reversing early losses. This rebound was triggered by a report suggesting the US and Iran are nearing a deal to end their conflict, leading to a steep decline in oil prices and a broad-based market rally.
